privileged_info_summary: Task creates a synthetic Maven project (security-utils) containing a PasswordValidator class with validation logic and a test suite with exactly 8 redundant test methods that need refactoring. The test file path is src/test/java/com/security/PasswordValidatorTest.java and the project directory is /home/ga/IdeaProjects/security-utils. All 8 redundant method names are confirmed to exist in the generated test file: testValidPassword, testTooShort, testNoDigit, testNoUppercase, testHasWhitespace, testEmpty, testNull, and testVeryLongPassword. JUnit 5.9.2 is used for the test framework. Note: The pom.xml specifies Maven Surefire version 3.0.0 which does not exist as a final release in Maven Central Repository (only milestone versions 3.0.0-M1 through M8 are available), though this issue is in the setup infrastructure rather than the metadata claims.
